description: Calendar retrieval, event mutation, conflict detection, and schedule recommendation workflows.
design_rules: Tasks must stay vendor-neutral within the category.
Tasks should be short enough for high sample count and repeated simulation.
Fake tools should preserve differentiated product logic, not just naming differences.

core_tasks.title: Recommend a time slot
core_tasks.goal: Suggest a good time based on availability.

reserve_tasks.title: Find a free block
reserve_tasks.goal: Locate a free block that fits constraints.

explicit_exclusions: Room booking systems as a hard dependency
